assignments.name: Add_New_Ticket_To_Sub_Ticket_Collection
assignments.label: Add New Ticket To Sub-Ticket Collection

assignments.name: Assign_Values_To_Ticket_Assignee_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Values To Ticket Assignee Variable

assignments.description: Assign the record variable of the Ticket that triggered this flow to the varSubTicket to create variable and overwrite the comments with the user's input from SubTicketScreen
assignments.name: Clone_Triggering_Ticket
assignments.label: Clone Triggering Ticket

assignments.description: Reset datatable selection, buttons and other values to their state when the flow started running.
assignments.name: Reset_Values
assignments.label: Reset Values

decisions.description: Take path to Create or Delete Sub Tickets based on the button click in SubTicketScreen
decisions.name: Create_or_Remove_Sub_Tickets
decisions.label: Create or Remove Sub Tickets

Flow.description:
Tickets
This flow allows users to create and assign sub-tickets that are clones of the parents, but with the option to modify the Comments field. Also, give the user the ability to remove previously created Sub-Tickets

formulas.name: f_ExemptTicketFromRequiredAsset
formulas.expression: IF( {!varSubTicketToCreate.RecordType.Name} = "System Enhancement Ticket" || ( {!varSubTicketToCreate.RecordType.Name} = "Data Quality Request" && ( CONTAINS({!varSubTicketToCreate.pro_Affected_Object__c}, "Asset") || CONTAINS({!varSubTicketToCreate.pro_Affected_Object__c}, "Assembly") ) ), TRUE, FALSE )

Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Bulk Create Sub Tickets

recordCreates.description: Create a Ticket Assignee based on the input to the user lookup in SubTicketScreen
recordCreates.name: Create_Ticket_Assignee
recordCreates.label: Create Ticket Assignee

recordDeletes.description: Delete Ticket Assignee records that are children to the Sub-Tickets selected for deletion.
recordDeletes.name: Delete_Sub_Ticket_Assignees
recordDeletes.label: Delete Sub Ticket Assignees

recordLookups.name: Get_Assemblies_Linked_To_Main_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Assemblies Linked To Main Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Assets_Linked_To_Main_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Assets Linked To Main Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Document_Links_To_Main_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Content Document Links To Main Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Contracts_Linked_To_Main_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Contracts Linked To Main Ticket

recordLookups.description: Get all Sub Tickets in relation to the Ticket from which this flow was launched.
recordLookups.name: Get_Sub_Tickets
recordLookups.label: Get Sub Tickets

recordUpdates.name: Update_Assets_and_Assemblies_Fields_On_Sub_Tickets
recordUpdates.label: Update Assets and Assemblies Fields On Sub-Tickets

value.stringValue: pro_Subject_Name__c:147, pro_Title__c:226, pro_Assemblies_Long_Text__c:159, pro_Assets_Long_Text__c:120, pro_Contracts__c:197, pro_Assignees_Long_Text__c:143, pro_Requested_By_Formula__c:130, pro_Status__c:84, pro_Expected_Due_Date__c:152

pro_Subject_Name__c:false, pro_Title__c:true, pro_Assemblies_Long_Text__c:true, pro_Assets_Long_Text__c:true, pro_Contracts__c:true, pro_Assignees_Long_Text__c:true, pro_Requested_By_Formula__c:false, pro_Status__c:true, pro_Expected_Due_Date__c:false

subflows.name: Prodigy_Auto_Prepare_Variables_To_Attach_Assets_Assemblies_To_Ticket_Flow_1
subflows.label: Prodigy - Auto - Prepare Variables To Attach Assets & Assemblies To Ticket Flow 1

variables.description: Variable holding the Ticket from which this flow was launched.
variables.name: recordId
